name: Pomegranate Extract
summary: Pomegranate Extract is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Cognition; Stress Response; Cardiovascular Health. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Oxidative Stress Modulation; Vascular Function Support; Stress Response Modulation; Endothelial Function Support, not treatment claims.
description: Pomegranate Extract is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Cognition; Stress Response; Cardiovascular Health. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Oxidative Stress Modulation; Vascular Function Support; Stress Response Modulation; Endothelial Function Support, not treatment claims.
safetyNotes: Human pomegranate juice and extract studies were heterogeneous, with inconsistent product characterization and limited safety and interaction reporting. Small blood-pressure effects do not establish a clinically significant antihypertensive interaction; pregnancy, breastfeeding, surgery, and medication-specific safety remain insufficiently characterized.
